meta.value_rule: rank<=10 and band accuracy 95% LB >50% and edge>0
meta.fail_closed: games show fewer bets when bands do not qualify; thresholds never relax
meta.calibration: settled graded picks in data/weekly.json; per-band Wilson 95% LB gates admission (thin/lucky bands excluded). Pooled multi-season replay (2019-2023, n=1390) recalibrated the bands; the 2021-24 train / 2025 verify held-out split still awaits 2024-25 game-line ratings.
